name: io.github.zuohuiyang/crashdump-mcp-server
title: CrashDump MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol server for remote Windows crash dump analysis using WinDbg/CDB

runtimeArguments.name: --public-base-url
runtimeArguments.description: Client-reachable base URL used when returning upload_url; required for remote upload workflows

environmentVariables.description: Symbol path for Windows debugging (optional, defaults to Microsoft symbol server)
environmentVariables.name: _NT_SYMBOL_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Client-reachable base URL used when returning upload_url; required for remote upload workflows
environmentVariables.name: CRASHDUMP_MCP_SERVER_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Directory used for temporary uploaded dump storage
environmentVariables.name: CRASHDUMP_MCP_UPLOAD_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Maximum upload size in megabytes for crash dump uploads
environmentVariables.name: CRASHDUMP_MCP_MAX_UPLOAD_MB

environmentVariables.description: Time-to-live in seconds for inactive upload sessions
environmentVariables.name: CRASHDUMP_MCP_SESSION_TTL_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of active upload sessions
environmentVariables.name: CRASHDUMP_MCP_MAX_ACTIVE_SESSIONS
